hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E 'SKILL\.md$' | while read f; do dir=$(dirname "$f"); python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/quick_validate.py "$dir" || exit 1; done
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '(eval_plan|feedback|suggestions)\.json$' | while read f; do python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/quick_validate.py "$f" || exit 1; done
